headline: Retina & Diabetic Eye Care in Chennai
subheadline: Specialized retina evaluation for diabetic retinopathy and macular degeneration in KK Nagar.
metaDescription: Diabetic retinopathy and macular degeneration screening in KK Nagar, Chennai with Dr. Rajeswari. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Fellowship-Trained Retina Expertise
whyPatientsChoose.description: Dr. Rajeswari holds a Medical Retina Fellowship, bringing specialist-level care close to home.

symptoms: You have diabetes, regardless of control
Sudden floaters or flashes of light
Age 50+ with no recent dilated exam

processSteps.title: Dilated Retina Exam
processSteps.description: A thorough examination of the retina and macula to detect early changes.

processSteps.title: Imaging & Diagnosis
processSteps.description: Retinal imaging to precisely assess any damage.

processSteps.title: Tailored Management
processSteps.description: From monitoring to injections or laser -- matched to what your eyes need.
